\tzpentry{ID11425}{Occupancy Equivalent Radius Ratio}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
For an n-dimensional hypervolume fraction phi_i, the equivalent radius ratio is phi_i to the one over n.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\frac{R_i}{R}=\phi_i^{1/n}
\paragraph{Registry Metadata.}
UUID: \texttt{e36353fa-0971-50e9-967a-fce3ca0f0397}. PiID: \texttt{PiID-11425-s4s5-mix}. LOC: \texttt{QC - Physics}. arXiv: \texttt{physics.gen-ph}.
